title: Queue Backlog Approval Pause
headline: Approval workflow for a downstream backlog incident.
description: Starts a queue backlog workflow that pauses for approval because the remediation plan is operationally sensitive, giving operators a second approval-focused incident profile.

request_body.prompt: Investigate the billing queue backlog and propose a safe remediation checklist.

notes: This profile shows that approval pauses are not hardcoded to one incident type.
It also creates a good conversation about safe mitigation under downstream load.

operator_steps: Start the workflow and wait for the approval pause.
Review the evidence and recommended checklist.
Reject or approve it to compare workflow control paths.
